message:
test(tokio-parity): add contract tests for performance regression budget policy

Contract tests for bead 2oh2u.10.7 enforcing:
- Deterministic budget schema structure and required fields
- Alarm rule IDs and escalation semantics
- Required CI artifact references
- Runner command contract tokens
- Downstream binding coverage for tracks T2-T7
